Southampton ace Virgil van Dijk is set to join Manchester City, according to a Mirror report.

The newspaper claims the 25-year-old centre-back will join the Citizens when the summer transfer window opens on July 1 in a sensational £60million switch.

It is said that despite “overtures ” from Liverpool and Chelsea, City manager Pep Guardiola has won the race to sign the Dutchman who is set to earn more than £200,000-a-week in a five-year deal with the Manchester giants.
